examples: Sir, I don't seek a quarrel, not being a braggart.
But if he is born in spring, he will be less of a braggart.
Modest by nature, she was no braggart, preferring to let her accomplishments speak for themselves.
And while Hebborn was a narcissist and braggart, he was also a bolder thinker than Dutton.
Would I come off as a braggart if I argued that I was more deserving than colleagues?
